briefdescription.para: This function converts a non-negative integer to an octet string of a specified length.

parameterdescription.para: is the variable in which input should be provided.
holds the required size.
is a pointer in which output will be updated.

briefdescription.para: This function updates KEK red key availability status from boot header.

listitem.para: Decryption Key source status.

briefdescription.para: This function provides Obfuscated Aes Key source.

parameterdescription.para: is the Key source given in Pdi
is the current DecKeyMask
is the pointer to the calculated KeySrc

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: is the Key source given in Pdi
is the current DecKeyMask
is the pointer to the calculated KeySrc

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: is the Key source given in Pdi.
is the current DecKeyMask.
is the pointer to the calculated KeySrc.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: This function runs the KAT for RSA.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
is pointer in which output of this function will be stored.
specifies the required length.
is pointer which holds the input data for which mask should be calculated which should be 48 bytes length.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_SEC_BUF_CLEAR_ERR if failed to clear buffer.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
is pointer in which output of this function will be stored.
specifies the required length.
is pointer which holds the input data for which mask should be calculated which should be 48 bytes length.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
Errorcode on failure.

briefdescription.para: This function checks Secure State for Authentication.

parameterdescription.para: - Buffer to store Secure state for authentication

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_HWROT_BH_AUTH_NOT_ALLOWED if PPK is programmed and boot header authentication is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: - Buffer to store Secure state for authentication
- Buffer to store Secure state for authentication.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_HWROT_BH_AUTH_NOT_ALLOWED if PPK is programmed and boot header authentication is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Buffer to store Secure state for authentication.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_GLITCH_DETECTED if glitch is detected.
If PPK hash is programmed in eFUSEs, then Secure State of boot is A-HWRoT.
If BHDR authentication is enabled, then Secure State of boot is emulated A-HWRoT.

inbodydescription.para: If PPK hash is programmed in eFUSEs, then Secure State of boot is A-HWRoT
If PPK hash is not programmed in eFUSEs and PLM is authenticated then Secure State of boot is emulated A-HWRoT

listitem.para: If PPK hash is programmed in eFUSEs, then Secure State of boot is A-HWRoT.
If BHDR authentication is enabled, then Secure State of boot is emulated A-HWRoT.
If PPK hash is programmed in eFUSEs, then Secure State of boot is A-HWRoT.
If PPK hash is not programmed in eFUSEs and PLM is authenticated then Secure State of boot is emulated A-HWRoT.

inbodydescription.para: If PPK hash is programmed in eFUSEs, then Secure State of boot is A-HWRoT
If PPK hash is not programmed in eFUSEs and PLM is authenticated then Secure State of boot is emulated A-HWRoT
